privileged_info_summary: Task 'partial_erase@1' uses real Unsplash images (800x534px and 800x802px JPEG files) as input data. The verifier requires an alpha channel, at least 8% transparency, PNG output format, and meaningful erasure detection (5%+ pixel alpha changes). Success requires 4/5 criteria met (score >=75). Task timeout is 90 seconds with max 8 steps. Screen resolution is 1920x1080 at 10 FPS. Note: There is a discrepancy between the setup script's hardcoded 800x600 fallback image size and the actual downloaded Unsplash image dimensions.
